hero.title: Transparent Supply Chains,
hero.subtitle: Register products, track every event from harvest to retail, and let anyone verify authenticity with a QR scan — all secured by Soroban smart contracts.

features.heading: Everything you need
features.subheading: A complete toolkit for producers, logistics partners, and consumers.

registration.title: Product Registration
registration.desc: Register any physical product on-chain with a unique ID, origin, and metadata.

tracking.title: Event Tracking
tracking.desc: Log every supply chain event — harvest, processing, shipping, retail — with timestamps.

qr.title: QR Verification
qr.desc: Consumers scan a QR code to instantly verify product authenticity and full history.

auth.title: Multi-party Auth
auth.desc: Authorize multiple actors per product. Only approved parties can add events.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.subheading: Four steps from registration to consumer verification.

step1.title: Register your product
step1.desc: Connect your Freighter wallet and register a product on the Soroban smart contract. You get a unique on-chain ID.

step2.title: Authorize supply chain actors
step2.desc: Add logistics partners, processors, and retailers as authorized actors who can log events.

step3.title: Log events at each stage
step3.desc: Each authorized actor logs events (harvest, processing, shipping, retail) with location and metadata.

step4.title: Consumers verify with QR
step4.desc: A QR code links to the full on-chain history. Anyone can verify authenticity without a wallet.

useCases.heading: Built for every industry
useCases.subheading: From farm to pharmacy, Supply-Link adapts to any physical supply chain.

food.title: Food & Beverage
food.desc: Trace organic certifications, cold-chain compliance, and farm-to-table provenance.

pharma.title: Pharmaceuticals
pharma.desc: Ensure drug authenticity, track lot numbers, and prevent counterfeits.

fashion.title: Fashion
fashion.desc: Verify ethical sourcing, material origins, and fair-trade certifications.

electronics.title: Electronics
electronics.desc: Track component origins, assembly locations, and warranty chains.

cta.heading: Ready to get started?
cta.subheading: Connect your Freighter wallet and register your first product in under a minute.

notFound.title: Product Not Found
notFound.desc: No product with this ID exists on this network:
notFound.hint: The QR code may be invalid or the product may have been removed.
